homestay.name: Lily Homestay Medan
homestay.description: Experience the warmth of a family home wrapped in the charm of Medan’s heritage. A cozy, peaceful retreat where blooming gardens meet cultural stories of care and comfort.
homestay.location: Jl. Jendral Ahmad Yani No. 12, Medan City Center, North Sumatra, Indonesia

package.name: Lily Homestay Package
package.tagline: Full House · Perfect for Families & Groups
package.description: Book the entire Lily Homestay for your group or family. Enjoy complete privacy with full access to all rooms, the flower garden, kitchen, and living spaces.

blog_posts.title: 5 Hidden Gems in Medan You Must Visit
blog_posts.excerpt: From Tjong A Fie Mansion to tucked-away Batak cultural corners — discover Medan’s secret spots beyond the tourist trail.
blog_posts.author: Lily

blog_posts.title: The Ultimate Medan Food Guide for First-Timers
blog_posts.excerpt: Soto Medan, Bika Ambon, and durian — a curated guide to Medan’s legendary food scene, with our personal picks.
blog_posts.author: Zara

blog_posts.title: How We Grow Our Garden: A Season of Blooming
blog_posts.excerpt: Behind the beauty of Lily Homestay’s signature flower garden — the story of soil, seeds, and a whole lot of love.
blog_posts.author: Lily
